violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed numerous food items in the cooler/freezer that were not protected from potential contamination.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed numerous food items in cooler not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed loose hanging debris from the vent by the pizza oven.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bag of eggs in walk in cooler. -Observed open bag of pancakes in walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent over pizza oven has dust hanging from vents.
